name: Stuffed Cucumber
recipeInstructions:
1. Score the cucumber all around by scraping from top to bottom with fork tines.
2. Cut ends off and scoop out seeds from the center using a small spoon and vegetable corer. Ensure all seeds are removed as they contain most of the moisture.
3. Mash the cheese with a fork, then add onion flakes and dill weed. Mash together until well combined.
4. Stuff the cucumber with the mixture and wrap securely.
5. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
6. To serve, slice the cucumber and sprinkle with paprika. It can be served as is or on a cracker.
